title: mimosa triquetra
intro: Mimosa triquetra, also known as sensitive plant, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Mimosa triquetra include reducing stress, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as relieving symptoms of menopause and menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Mimosa triquetra can be made into teas, tinctures, or capsules, and are often used to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality.
